strength.label: Rigid Spectrum (Strength)
strength.desc: Measures neuromuscular recruitment efficiency relative to body weight (DOTS coefficient). Higher values indicate stronger absolute rigidity output per unit body mass.

explosivePower.label: Burst Spectrum (Power)
explosivePower.desc: Measures instantaneous kinetic discharge and power output. Higher values indicate greater explosive force and vertical work capacity in very short time windows.

cardio.label: Rhythm Spectrum (Cardio)
cardio.desc: Measures cardiovascular stability and aerobic ceiling. Higher values indicate stronger thermal management and endurance under sustained high-intensity operation.

muscleMass.label: Build Spectrum (Muscle)
muscleMass.desc: Measures skeletal-muscle density relative to height. Higher values indicate more mature physical structure and stronger baseline metabolic capacity.

bodyFat.label: Refine Spectrum (FFMI/Fat)
bodyFat.desc: Measures optimization between body-fat ratio and lean mass. Higher values indicate cleaner tissue composition and a stronger power-to-weight profile.

gripStrength.label: Potential Spectrum (Grip)
gripStrength.desc: Measures terminal neural response and grip output. Higher values indicate shorter neural transmission paths, higher precision, and stronger limit control.

BASE.title: Baseline Calibration
BASE.summary: [CHASSIS READY] You're on the board. Every lift still has room to grow—steady work is how you unlock the full power curve.

TIER_41.title: Horsepower Online
TIER_41.summary: [HORSEPOWER ONLINE] Early days in the weight room. Your body is learning to sit under load and stay structurally tight.

TIER_51.title: Structure Locked
TIER_51.summary: [STRUCTURE LOCKED] Foundations are in place—you're a solid presence in any gym. Output is cleaner, and you hold your shape better when the weight gets heavy.

TIER_61.title: Steady Load Bearer
TIER_61.summary: [STEADY LOAD] You're in the regular heavy-training lane now—reliable under high resistance and able to keep driving force through the whole set.

TIER_71.title: Serious Horsepower
TIER_71.summary: [SERIOUS HORSEPOWER] Standout strength in a commercial gym. You stay strong and composed even when the loading is dense and unforgiving.

TIER_81.title: Performance Apex
TIER_81.summary: [PERFORMANCE APEX] Top of the everyday lifter range—output and bar control are knocking on competitive doors. Outside dedicated powerlifting, you're ready for most physical challenges.

TIER_91.title: Competitive Output
TIER_91.summary: [COMPETITIVE OUTPUT] Past the amateur ceiling. Real horsepower on tap, clear natural strength, and you're edging into professional-grade territory.

TIER_101.title: Regional Dominance
TIER_101.summary: [REGIONAL DOMINANCE] Podium-level potential at regional power meets. Matched rivals are scarce—pin the throttle and most people aren't catching you.

TIER_111.title: Elite Competition
TIER_111.summary: [ELITE COMPETITION] A familiar winner at regional powerlifting. In daily training, peers are rare—you carry devastating output in reserve.

TIER_121.title: National Elite
TIER_121.summary: [NATIONAL ELITE] Strength that benchmarks against national elites. Few domestic rivals left—and under a loaded bar, your control over the weight is outright dominant.

TIER_131.title: Physiological Limit
TIER_131.summary: [PHYSIOLOGICAL LIMIT] International meet-winner material, knocking on what humans can actually do. Strength, skill, and genetics all have to show up—factory build and years of hard tuning, fused into one package.

TIER_141.title: Transcendent Data
TIER_141.summary: [PHANTOM LOAD] You're picking fights with gravity itself—international master territory. A thousand horsepower still undersells what you can move.

LEGEND.title: Legend Crystallized
LEGEND.summary: [LEGEND CRYSTALLIZED] Off the charts. Beyond normal human limits—your strength sits at the apex of the species. No debate: superhuman tier.

BASE.title: Stock Torque
BASE.summary: [STOCK TQ] Baseline transient response; drivetrain awaiting high-stall conversion.

TIER_71.title: High-Boost Launch
TIER_71.summary: [HIGH-BOOST LAUNCH] Boost pressure spools instantly; superior transient response.

TIER_81.title: Launch Control
TIER_81.summary: [LAUNCH CONTROL] Matching track-spec launch systems; extreme bite with minimal traction loss.

TIER_91.title: Supercharged
TIER_91.summary: [SUPERCHARGED] Full RPM torque curve; clearing amateur limits instantly.

TIER_101.title: Drag Spec Clutch
TIER_101.summary: [DRAG SPEC CLUTCH] Zero-latency power transmission; built for drag-strip launches.

TIER_111.title: Rocket Thruster
TIER_111.summary: [ROCKET THRUSTER] Overclocked compression; superior shaft twisting power.

TIER_121.title: Hypercar Instant
TIER_121.summary: [HYPERCAR INSTANT] Flawless electric-mechanical link; absolute authority over initial friction.

TIER_131.title: Mega-Torque Plateau
TIER_131.summary: [MEGA-TORQUE PLATEAU] Heavy industrial motor torque; zero loss to structural flex.

BASE.title: Baseline Calibration
BASE.summary: [BASELINE CALIBRATION] Early days—building a steady aerobic foundation. Huge room still on the table.

TIER_41.title: Cooling Online
TIER_41.summary: [COOLING ONLINE] Still below the general population average. Your engine is building its first real cardio base—a little focused work goes a long way.

TIER_51.title: Efficiency Tuned
TIER_51.summary: [EFFICIENCY TUNED] Sitting around the population average. You're getting comfortable with what steady endurance work feels like.

TIER_61.title: Stable Cruise
TIER_61.summary: [STABLE CRUISE] You're in the regular-runner lane—long, controlled efforts and sharp pacing. Most people on factory settings never touch this level.

TIER_71.title: Full Heat Cycle
TIER_71.summary: [FULL HEAT CYCLE] Cruising power took a big step up. Clearly above the crowd—enough engine to handle the tactical surges in other sports.

TIER_81.title: Balanced Performance
TIER_81.summary: [BALANCED PERFORMANCE] Ahead of most recreational athletes your age. This endurance carries into other sports—and you're right at the edge of breaking out of amateur tier.

TIER_91.title: Competitive Awakening
TIER_91.summary: [COMPETITIVE AWAKENING] Competitive genes showing. This kind of output doesn't happen without serious training—you're pointed at the professional lane.

TIER_101.title: High-Efficiency Cruise
TIER_101.summary: [HIGH-EFFICIENCY CRUISE] Few real rivals on the track—regional ace level. Remarkable cardio resilience; built to lead under long, hard pressure.

TIER_111.title: Limit Endurance
TIER_111.summary: [LIMIT ENDURANCE] Elite competition tier. Podiums at regional meets are within reach—extreme endurance, recovery stays ice-cold.

TIER_121.title: Track Dominance
TIER_121.summary: [TRACK DOMINANCE] Ceiling of the amateur runner class. On the long-course circuit you run the show—endurance events rarely produce a match.

TIER_131.title: Apex Runner
TIER_131.summary: [APEX RUNNER] Front row of national athletes. Cardiopulmonary system tuned to top spec—you're the one setting cruise at the front.

TIER_141.title: Dream Endurance
TIER_141.summary: [DREAM ENDURANCE] The final boss of every meet tier. Opponents don't want to see your name on the start list.

LEGEND.title: God of the Long Run
LEGEND.summary: [GOD OF THE LONG RUN] Data overflow. Legend territory—almost nobody on Earth can stay in your slipstream. Aliens might be the fair fight.

G_PLATFORM.title: Serial Code: Iron Chassis (G-Platform)
G_PLATFORM.summary: Chassis rigidity is exceptionally high. In the {{genderGroup}} sequence, your torque output falls into heavy-platform class; gravity loads read as light cruising resistance.

HIGH_OUTPUT.title: Serial Code: High Output Afterburn (High-Output)
HIGH_OUTPUT.summary: Throttle response is extremely sensitive. Neural recruitment behaves like launch-control ignition, pushing power to redline in minimal distance.

ENDURANCE_PROTO.title: Serial Code: Endurance Prototype (Endurance-P)
ENDURANCE_PROTO.summary: Thermal management is outstanding. You demonstrate 24-hour Le Mans style stability, built to lead long-range endurance sectors.

WIDE_BODY.title: Serial Code: Wide-Body Architecture (Wide-Body)
WIDE_BODY.summary: Structural load profile shows dominant downforce characteristics. High-density fibers provide a powerful foundation, making you a stable heavyweight target across all terrain.

AERO_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Aero Optimization (Aero-Spec)
AERO_SPEC.summary: Power-to-weight has reached track-record class. With low drag and low fat ratio, every gram of mass is allocated for pure performance.

MR_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Mid-Engine Balance (MR-Spec)
MR_SPEC.summary: Steering feedback is surgically precise. Neural control resembles a mid-engine layout, enabling elegant corner entry and stable output through the apex.

GT_CRUISER.title: Serial Code: Grand Tourer (Grand Tourer)
GT_CRUISER.summary: All-spectrum performance is fully unlocked. You carry flagship-grade elegance and aggression, with no power dead zones across sector or weather. You are the most complete fit in this sequence.
